email_subject: Application for Customer Service Representative - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at MICHAEL PAGE INTERNATIONAL (BELGIUM), as advertised. With a strong background in customer-facing roles and order management, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your client's manufacturing team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships and coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely delivery of projects. I have experience using ERP systems and am proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel. My previous experience in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie has honed my organizational skills and ability to thrive in fast-paced environments.

I am fluent in Dutch and English, with a customer-oriented mindset and a proactive approach to problem-solving. I am eager to bring my skills in order management and stakeholder coordination to this role.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can add value to your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at MICHAEL PAGE INTERNATIONAL (BELGIUM). With a solid foundation in customer service, order management, and cross-functional coordination, I am well-prepared to support your client in the manufacturing sector.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and coordinate with internal teams to ensure project milestones are met. This role has strengthened my communication skills and my ability to prioritize multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment. I am proficient in using ERP systems and have hands-on experience with Microsoft Excel for data tracking and reporting.

Previously, I worked as a Warehouse & Logistics associate at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics setting. This experience taught me the importance of attention to detail and proactive communication—skills directly applicable to managing customer orders and resolving issues.

I am fluent in Dutch and English, and I am currently improving my French. I am customer-focused, solution-oriented, and comfortable working with internal stakeholders such as Sales, Supply Chain, and Logistics. I am eager to contribute to a dynamic team and help ensure an excellent customer experience.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with this role.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Managed customer orders and coordinated with internal teams (Sales, Supply Chain, Logistics) to ensure timely delivery.
Proficient in ERP systems and Microsoft Office, especially Excel for data tracking and reporting.
Fluent in Dutch and English; customer-oriented with strong communication skills.
Proactive problem-solver with experience in fast-paced environments (warehouse logistics).
Detail-oriented and organized, with a track record of maintaining accuracy in high-volume settings.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service Representative
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Customer service professional with experience in order management, stakeholder coordination, and administrative support. Skilled in ERP systems and Microsoft Office, with a customer-oriented mindset and fluency in Dutch and English. Proven ability to manage multiple priorities in fast-paced environments, ensuring accurate and timely order fulfillment. Eager to contribute to a manufacturing team as a Customer Service Representative.

CORE SKILLS
- Order Management & Customer Service: order processing, order-to-cash, customer inquiries, issue resolution, relationship building
- ERP Systems: experience with ERP systems (SAP knowledge is a plus)
- Microsoft Office: Excel (data tracking, reporting), Word, Outlook
- Communication: fluent Dutch and English; French (asset)
- Coordination: cross-functional collaboration with Sales, Supply Chain, Logistics, Production
- Organizational: attention to detail, multitasking, proactive problem-solving
- Continuous Improvement: process improvement mindset

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Managed client relationships and coordinated with internal teams to ensure timely project delivery
- Tracked and reported on project performance using analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console)
- Maintained accurate client records and documentation
- Supported continuous improvement of client service processes

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Coordinated with team members to ensure smooth operations and timely order fulfillment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver project milestones

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing full project lifecycle from planning to launch
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve search visibility
- Coordinated with client to ensure requirements were met

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
